title: Scene 1 — Holmes entrance / exit
notes: Holmes faces front, turns to profile, then walks frame-right and exits. Plain single-subject silhouette. Projectionist-approved — director review pending.

title: Scene 4 — Séance: Moriarty flickers to the Ghost
notes: Moriarty (man, coat, bowler) flickers out; the Ghost (woman, hooded cloak) flickers in. Flicker-swap effect straddles the transformation. Projectionist-approved — director review pending.

title: Scene 5 — The Falls: fight + falling deerstalker
notes: Moriarty solo, Holmes enters, the grapple at the falls, the deerstalker falls and lands, Holmes downed, Moriarty exits, Holmes returns alone. Single union silhouette. Projectionist-approved — director review pending.
